intelligence.hypothesis: Telemetry stable; no immediate stress signal.

P2_mexican_mint_black_pot.status: Present and healthy, showing active growth from [T-3] onwards. Initially bare soil in [EARLIEST].
P2_mexican_mint_black_pot.reconciliation_note: Plant in P2 is consistent with a broadleaf herb, potentially young Mexican Mint, based on leaf morphology and growth pattern.

systemic_losses.Unregistered_yellow_pot: Declared a 'Systemic Loss' as it is present in [EARLIEST] with bare soil but disappears from all subsequent images.

new_introductions_interventions.Unregistered_white_cup_with_cutting: Declared a 'New Introduction/Intervention' from [T-2] onwards, containing a healthy plant cutting in water.
new_introductions_interventions.electronic_component_black_pot: An electronic component with wires is present in the black pot from [T-3] onwards, not part of the registry.
new_introductions_interventions.black_tag_yellow_pot: A black tag/sensor was present in the unregistered yellow pot in [EARLIEST].
new_introductions_interventions.eggshell_fragments_black_pot: Eggshell fragments are consistently present in the black pot from [EARLIEST] onwards.

P2_black_pot_plant.earliest_state: Bare soil with eggshell fragments. Soil appears relatively dry.
P2_black_pot_plant.t_3_state: Small plant with 4-5 rounded, dark green, turgid leaves. Appears healthy. Soil is dark, eggshell fragments present. Electronic component visible.
P2_black_pot_plant.t_2_state: Plant stable, healthy, similar size and leaf count to [T-3]. Leaves dark green, turgid. Soil dark.
P2_black_pot_plant.t_1_state: Plant shows slight growth; leaves appear slightly larger, possibly more numerous. Color remains dark green, turgid. Soil appears slightly drier or lighter due to brighter lighting.
P2_black_pot_plant.current_state: Plant shows continued healthy growth. Leaves are larger and more numerous (estimated 6-7 visible). Dark green, turgid. Soil appears dark and moist.

unregistered_white_cup_cutting.t_2_state: Single green, turgid leaf/stem cutting submerged in water. Appears healthy.
unregistered_white_cup_cutting.current_state: Cutting remains stable, green, turgid. Water level consistent.

biome_observations.incidental_growth: No weeds, moss, secondary seedlings, or uncatalogued sprouts observed in any pot.

biome_anomalies.soil_texture: Soil in P2 black pot appears relatively dry in [EARLIEST] and slightly drier/lighter in [T-1], but adequately moist and dark in [T-3], [T-2], and [CURRENT]. No cracking observed. Soil in yellow pot in [EARLIEST] appears dry. Water present in white cup from [T-2] onwards.
biome_anomalies.debris_on_desk: Wires, electronic components, a blue book, and a white pen are consistently visible background elements. Eggshell fragments are consistently present in the black pot. A black tag/sensor was in the yellow pot in [EARLIEST].
biome_anomalies.image_t_4_anomaly: The image labeled [T-4] is completely black, indicating a data acquisition or storage anomaly.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t_4: The scene becomes completely black, indicating a loss of visual data.
temporal_deltas.t_4_to_t_3: Visual data returns. The unregistered yellow pot is no longer present. A small, healthy plant has appeared in the black pot (P2). An electronic component is now visible near P2. The overall lighting is dark.
temporal_deltas.t_3_to_t_2: A new white cup containing a healthy plant cutting in water has been introduced. The plant in P2 remains stable and healthy. Lighting remains dark.
temporal_deltas.t_2_to_1: The plant in P2 shows subtle signs of growth (slightly larger leaves). The cutting in the white cup remains stable. The overall scene lighting becomes significantly brighter.
temporal_deltas.t_1_to_current: The plant in P2 continues to grow, with larger and more numerous leaves. The cutting in the white cup remains stable. The overall scene lighting returns to a darker state, similar to [T-2] and [T-3].

visual_health_inference.P2_black_pot_plant_health: Consistently healthy from its appearance in [T-3] through [CURRENT]. Exhibits active and robust growth, with turgid, dark green leaves. Soil moisture appears adequate in most recent observations.
visual_health_inference.unregistered_white_cup_cutting_health: Consistently healthy from its introduction in [T-2] through [CURRENT]. The leaf is green and turgid, indicating good hydration.
visual_health_inference.overall_biome_health: The active plant life in the biome is in good health and showing positive development.

anomalies.missing_registry_item: White rabbit (scale anchor) is not visible.
anomalies.systemic_loss: Unregistered yellow pot is lost after [EARLIEST].
anomalies.new_introductions: Unregistered white cup with cutting, electronic component in P2, eggshell fragments in P2 (though present from earliest, they are an intervention not part of the plant registry).

vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical audit commenced with a black pot (P2) and an unregistered yellow pot, both containing bare soil; the black pot featured eggshell fragments, and the yellow pot a sensor. A significant data anomaly occurred with a completely black image ([T-4]). Subsequently, the yellow pot was lost from the scene. A small, healthy, broadleaf plant emerged in the black pot (P2), exhibiting consistent and robust growth, characterized by increasing leaf size and count, and maintaining excellent turgor and dark green coloration. Simultaneously, a new white cup containing a healthy plant cutting in water was introduced, which also remained turgid and green throughout the observation period. Soil conditions in P2 appeared generally moist and conducive to growth. No incidental growth or fungal presence was detected. The designated scale anchor, a white rabbit, was not observed in any image. The electronic components and wires are persistent background elements.
